name: australian-bom-weather
title: Australian BOM Weather
description: Australian weather forecasts, warnings, and radar loops from the Bureau of Meteorology. For personal, non-commercial use.
author: tongy

commands.name: radar
commands.title: Browse Radar Loops
commands.description: Browse Bureau of Meteorology radar sites and products

commands.name: favorite
commands.title: Show Favorite Radar
commands.description: Render and display your quick-run favorite BoM radar

commands.name: forecast
commands.title: View Forecast
commands.description: View the Bureau of Meteorology forecast for your saved location

commands.name: locations
commands.title: Manage Weather Locations
commands.description: Search and save Bureau of Meteorology forecast locations

commands.name: weather-summary
commands.title: Weather Summary
commands.subtitle: BoM Australia
commands.description: Show current BoM weather in Raycast root search and open the forecast

commands.name: warnings
commands.title: Weather Warnings
commands.description: View Bureau of Meteorology warnings for your saved locations

commands.name: current-weather
commands.title: Current Weather
commands.description: Show current Bureau of Meteorology weather in the menu bar

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

Use \`npm run publish\` for Raycast Store publishing. Do not publish this package to npm.

" && exit 1
